en: You will say in that day:"I will give thanks to you, O LORD, for though you were angry with me, your anger turned away, that you might comfort me.
zh: 到那日，你必說： “耶和華啊！我要稱謝你， 因為你雖曾向我發怒， 你的怒氣卻已轉消， 你又安慰了我。

en: "Behold, God is my salvation; I will trust, and will not be afraid; for the LORD GOD is my strength and my song, and he has become my salvation."
zh: 看哪！ 神是我的拯救； 我要倚靠他，並不懼怕， 因為耶和華 神是我的力量，我的詩歌， 他也成了我的拯救。”

en: With joy you will draw water from the wells of salvation.
zh: 所以你們要快樂地 從救恩的泉源打水。

en: And you will say in that day: "Give thanks to the LORD, call upon his name, make known his deeds among the peoples, proclaim that his name is exalted.
zh: 到那日，你們必說： “要稱謝耶和華，呼求他的名； 在萬民中傳揚他的作為， 使他們謹記他那至高的名。

en: "Sing praises to the LORD, for he has done gloriously; let this be made known in all the earth.
zh: 你們要唱歌讚美耶和華，因為他作了極美的事； 願這事傳遍全地。

en: Shout, and sing for joy, O inhabitant of Zion, for great in your midst is the Holy One of Israel."
zh: 錫安的居民哪，當喊叫歡呼！ 因為以色列的聖者在你們中間是偉大的。”
